prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, landscape orientation
Primary request: Deadlands / Weird West inspired world map for the terrain type continent_archipelago.
Scene/backdrop: one dominant weird west frontier continent with a large uneven offshore archipelago like a flooded Great Maze, ghost-rock islands, broken coast settlements, haunted reefs, railhead ports, mine claims, desert badlands, canyonlands, prairies, spirit lands and cursed supernatural zones.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated frontier atlas, sepia parchment, engraved ink coastlines, hand-painted biome relief, old western survey-map ornamentation, ghost-rock steam-tech and horror-fantasy accents.
Composition/framing: wide landscape map; the main continent sits off-center with an irregular archipelago sweeping around it in a diagonal arc, with channels, reefs, volcanic islands, atolls, tiny islets and several large islands; include rail lines, mine symbols, compass rose and decorative border without readable labels.
Geography constraints: islands must be irregularly distributed, varied in size and shape, with broken shores and uneven spacing; continental coastline should include peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, deltas, capes, flooded canyons, marshy river mouths and curving shorelines; show many climates from desert to mountains, forest, swamp, plains and haunted wasteland.
Avoid: uniform island grid, simple round islands, single climate, modern satellite view, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
